title: Undopia Lower Totem of Undying
description: Lowers the Totem of Undying so that the view is not restricted too much
body:
![lower-totem-of-undying](https://i.imgur.com/2yy5imL.png) # Undopia Lower Totem of Undying [![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/undopia-lower-totem-of-undying?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&label=Modrinth&color=%231bd96a) ](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/undopia-lower-totem-of-undying) [![CurseForge Downloads](https://img.shields.io/curseforge/dt/1427538?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&label=CurseForge&color=%23f16436) ](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/undopia-lower-totem-of-undying) [![ko-fi](https://i.imgur.com/wv1uE4k.png)](https://ko-fi.com/undugt) Undopia Lower Totem of Undying moves the Totem of Undying down and changes its angle so that it is not annoying and does not unnecessarily restrict the view. ---
[![Undopia Patch Resource Pack](https://i.imgur.com/beZ50qS.png)](https://patch.undopia.net) This resource pack is part of the Undopia Patch family. It is made of these Undopia Patch Features ![fjkuuii.png](https://i.imgur.com/fjkuuii.png) If you want to customize any of these use the Undopia Patch Customizer.
